name: Curcumin + piperine
summary: Decision-ready summary: Curcumin + piperine is best framed for osteoarthritis pain; inflammation markers; bioavailability-enhanced curcumin use; safety screen: drug-interaction sensitive medications; anticoagulants; gallbladder disease.
description: Curcumin + piperine is used to support joint and inflammation-linked signaling, with piperine primarily improving curcumin systemic availability.
safetyNotes: Piperine can alter drug metabolism; avoid casual stacking with narrow-therapeutic-index medications.

claimMap.claim: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.
claimMap.notes: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.

sources.title: The Effects of Curcumin Plus Piperine Co-administration on Inflammation and Oxidative Stress: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
sources.note: source-backed gap-fill audit only; not a full monograph field extraction

contraindications: Previous turmeric- or curcumin-associated liver injury because recurrence after re-exposure has been reported.
